exmls.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<e:Skin class="skins.ButtonSkin" states="up,down,disabled" minHeight="50" minWidth="100" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui">
    <e:Image width="100%" height="100%" scale9Grid="1,3,8,8" alpha.disabled="0.5"
             source="button_up_png"
             source.down="button_down_png"/>
    <e:Label id="labelDisplay" top="8" bottom="8" left="8" right="8"
             size="20"
             textColor="0xFFFFFF" verticalAlign="middle" textAlign="center"/>
    <e:Image id="iconDisplay" horizontalCenter="0" verticalCenter="0"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="skins.CheckBoxSkin" states="up,down,disabled,upAndSelected,downAndSelected,disabledAndSelected" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui">
    <e:Group width="100%" height="100%">
        <e:layout>
            <e:HorizontalLayout verticalAlign="middle"/>
        </e:layout>
        <e:Image fillMode="scale" alpha="1" alpha.disabled="0.5" alpha.down="0.7"
                 source="checkbox_unselect_png"
                 source.upAndSelected="checkbox_select_up_png"
                 source.downAndSelected="checkbox_select_down_png"
                 source.disabledAndSelected="checkbox_select_disabled_png"/>
        <e:Label id="labelDisplay" size="20" textColor="0x707070"
                 textAlign="center" verticalAlign="middle"
                 fontFamily="Tahoma"/>
    </e:Group>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="CombineLayerSkin" width="750" height="682" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing" xmlns:ns1="*" >
	<w:Config id="15bad62ed30" ></w:Config>
	<e:Group anchorOffsetY="0" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0">
		<e:Group width="750" height="285" x="0" y="0">
			<e:Image source="bg_item1_png" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" x="0" y="0" scaleX="1" scaleY="1"/>
		</e:Group>
		<e:Image source="i_pluse_png" x="257.16" y="325"/>
		<e:Image source="i_equal_png" x="440" y="333.5"/>
		<e:Image id="img_left" x="145" y="309" anchorOffsetX="0" anchorOffsetY="0" source="bg_item2_png" scaleX="1" scaleY="1"/>
		<e:Image id="img_right" x="332" y="314" anchorOffsetX="0" anchorOffsetY="0" source="bg_item2_png" scaleX="1" scaleY="1"/>
		<e:Image id="img_result" x="510" y="314" anchorOffsetX="0" anchorOffsetY="0" source="bg_item2_png" scaleX="1" scaleY="1"/>
		<e:Group id="group_gril" width="53.03" height="145.45" x="375" y="682" anchorOffsetY="0" anchorOffsetX="0"/>
		<e:Scroller id="scroller_item" width="748.48" height="285" x="0" y="0" anchorOffsetX="0" anchorOffsetY="0" scrollPolicyV="on" scrollPolicyH="off" enabled="true" skinName="ScrollerSkin" bounces="false">
			<e:Group id="group_item">
				<e:layout>
					<e:TileLayout/>
				</e:layout>
			</e:Group>
		</e:Scroller>
		<e:Group id="group_touch_girl" width="254" height="250" x="253" y="432" anchorOffsetY="0" anchorOffsetX="0"/>
		<e:Group id="group_remind" width="200" height="200" x="518" y="423">
			<e:Image source="bg_bubble_png" x="11.000000000000114" y="9" scaleX="1" scaleY="1"/>
			<e:Group id="group_remind_pos" width="159.09" height="106.06" x="20" y="21" anchorOffsetX="0" anchorOffsetY="0"/>
		</e:Group>
	</e:Group>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="GameMainLayerSkin" width="750" height="1206" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing" >
	<w:Config id="15bacf6b7bd" ></w:Config>
	<e:Group top="0" bottom="0" left="0" right="0">
		<e:Image scale9Grid="6,3,39,24" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" source="bg_big_png"/>
		<e:Group id="group_up" width="745.45" height="680" x="0" y="0" anchorOffsetX="0" anchorOffsetY="0" touchEnabled="true" touchChildren="true">
		</e:Group>
		<e:Group id="group_down" width="745.45" height="526" x="0" y="680" anchorOffsetX="0" anchorOffsetY="0" touchEnabled="false" touchThrough="true" touchChildren="false">
		</e:Group>
		<e:Image source="cloud2_png" x="-74" y="590" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" touchEnabled="false"/>
		<e:Image source="cloud5_png" x="396" y="590" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" touchEnabled="false"/>
		<e:Image id="img_cloud2" source="cloud3_png" x="312" y="678" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" touchEnabled="false"/>
		<e:Image source="cloud1_png" x="-42" y="644" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" touchEnabled="false"/>
		<e:Image id="img_cloud1" source="cloud1_png" x="-32" y="654" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" touchEnabled="false"/>
		<e:Image source="cloud3_png" x="302" y="668" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" touchEnabled="false"/>
		<e:Image source="cloud4_png" x="490" y="650" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" touchEnabled="false"/>
		<e:Image id="img_cloud3" source="cloud4_png" x="500" y="660" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" touchEnabled="false"/>
	</e:Group>
	<e:Group id="HintGroup" width="253.22" height="105.15" x="19.17" y="843.94" anchorOffsetX="0" touchEnabled="false" anchorOffsetY="0">
		<e:Image source="hint_bg_png" scale9Grid="43,13,89,72" anchorOffsetY="0" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" skewY="180" anchorOffsetX="0"/>
		<e:Label id="HintLabel" text="Label" x="15" y="10" anchorOffsetX="0" width="224.73" anchorOffsetY="0" height="74.73" textAlign="left" verticalAlign="middle" textColor="0x000000" size="20"/>
	</e:Group>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="GameStarLayerSkin" width="750" height="1206" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing" >
	<w:Config id="15bb33cc86d" ></w:Config>
	<e:Image source="bg_start_png" x="0" y="0" height="1206"/>
	<e:Button id="btn_start" label="" x="228" y="882">
		<e:skinName>
			<e:Skin states="up,down,disabled">
			<e:Image width="100%" height="100%" source="start_png" source.down="start_png" source.disabled="start_png"/>
			<e:Label id="labelDisplay" horizontalCenter="0" verticalCenter="0"/>
			</e:Skin>
		</e:skinName>
	</e:Button>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="skins.HScrollBarSkin" minWidth="20" minHeight="8" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui">
    <e:Image id="thumb" source="roundthumb_png" scale9Grid="3,3,2,2" height="8" width="30" verticalCenter="0"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="skins.HSliderSkin" minWidth="20" minHeight="8" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui">
    <e:Image id="track" source="track_sb_png" scale9Grid="1,1,4,4" width="100%"
             height="6" verticalCenter="0"/>
    <e:Image id="thumb" source="thumb_png" verticalCenter="0"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="ItemCellSkin" width="102" height="96" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing" >
	<w:Config id="15bad6ffef0" ></w:Config>
	<e:Group top="0" bottom="0" left="0" right="0" horizontalCenter="0" verticalCenter="0" anchorOffsetX="50.33" anchorOffsetY="45.67">
		<e:Image id="img_item" x="0" y="0" anchorOffsetX="0" anchorOffsetY="0" source="item_fire_png"/>
		<e:Label id="label_name" text="Label" x="0.34" y="66" anchorOffsetX="0" width="100.99" textAlign="center" stroke="2"/>
		<e:Image id="img_bg" scale9Grid="7,8,43,48" source="right_png" y="0" x="34"/>
	</e:Group>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<e:Skin class="skins.ItemRendererSkin" states="up,down,disabled" minHeight="50" minWidth="100" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui">
    <e:Image width="100%" height="100%" scale9Grid="1,3,8,8" alpha.disabled="0.5"
             source="button_up_png"
             source.down="button_down_png"/>
    <e:Label id="labelDisplay" top="8" bottom="8" left="8" right="8"
             size="20" fontFamily="Tahoma"
             textColor="0xFFFFFF" text="{data}" verticalAlign="middle" textAlign="center"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="LaicalSkinSkin" width="40" height="40" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing" >
	<w:Config id="15bae1b53c5" ></w:Config>
	<e:Group id="LaicalBody" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0">
		<e:Image id="LaicalBodyImg" source="laical_body_png" x="0" y="0" width="40" height="40" visible="false"/>
	</e:Group>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="skins.PanelSkin" minHeight="230" minWidth="450" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui">
    <e:Image left="0" right="0" bottom="0"  top="0" source="border_png" scale9Grid="2,2,12,12" />
    <e:Group id="moveArea" left="0" right="0" top="0" height="45">
        <e:Image left="0" right="0" bottom="0"  top="0" source="header_png"/>
        <e:Label id="titleDisplay" size="20" fontFamily="Tahoma" textColor="0xFFFFFF"
                 wordWrap="false" left="15" right="5" verticalCenter="0"/>
    </e:Group>
    <e:Button id="closeButton" label="close" bottom="5" horizontalCenter="0"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="skins.ProgressBarSkin" minWidth="30" minHeight="18" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing">
	<e:Image source="track_pb_png" scale9Grid="1,1,4,4" width="100%"
			 height="100%" verticalCenter="0" visible="false" locked="true"/>
	<e:Image id="thumb" height="74%" width="97%" source="bg_progress_bar1_png" x="3" y="4"/>
	<e:Label id="labelDisplay" textAlign="center" verticalAlign="middle"
			 size="15" fontFamily="Tahoma" textColor="0x707070"
			 horizontalCenter="0" verticalCenter="0"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="skins.RadioButtonSkin" states="up,down,disabled,upAndSelected,downAndSelected,disabledAndSelected" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui">
    <e:Group width="100%" height="100%">
        <e:layout>
            <e:HorizontalLayout verticalAlign="middle"/>
        </e:layout>
        <e:Image fillMode="scale" alpha="1" alpha.disabled="0.5" alpha.down="0.7"
                 source="radiobutton_unselect_png"
                 source.upAndSelected="radiobutton_select_up_png"
                 source.downAndSelected="radiobutton_select_down_png"
                 source.disabledAndSelected="radiobutton_select_disabled_png"/>
        <e:Label id="labelDisplay" size="20" textColor="0x707070"
                 textAlign="center" verticalAlign="middle"
                 fontFamily="Tahoma"/>
    </e:Group>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="skins.ScrollerSkin" minWidth="20" minHeight="20" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui">
    <e:HScrollBar id="horizontalScrollBar" width="100%" bottom="0"/>
    <e:VScrollBar id="verticalScrollBar" height="100%" right="0"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?>
<e:Skin class="skins.TextInputSkin" minHeight="40" minWidth="300" states="normal,disabled,normalWithPrompt,disabledWithPrompt" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui">
	<e:Image width="100%" height="100%" scale9Grid="1,3,8,8" source="button_up_png"/>
	<e:Rect height="100%" width="100%" fillColor="0xffffff"/>
 	<e:EditableText id="textDisplay" verticalCenter="0" left="10" right="10"
	                textColor="0x000000" textColor.disabled="0xff0000" width="100%" height="24" size="20" />
	<e:Label id="promptDisplay" verticalCenter="0" left="10" right="10"
	                textColor="0xa9a9a9" width="100%" height="24" size="20" touchEnabled="false" includeIn="normalWithPrompt,disabledWithPrompt"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="skins.ToggleSwitchSkin" states="up,down,disabled,upAndSelected,downAndSelected,disabledAndSelected" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui">
    <e:Image source="on_png"
             source.up="off_png"
             source.down="off_png"
             source.disabled="off_png"/>
    <e:Image source="handle_png"
             horizontalCenter="-18"
             horizontalCenter.upAndSelected="18"
             horizontalCenter.downAndSelected="18"
             horizontalCenter.disabledAndSelected="18"
             verticalCenter="0"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="skins.UnderProgressBarSkin" minWidth="30" minHeight="18" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing">
	<e:Image width="100%"
			 height="100%" verticalCenter="0" source="bg_progress_bar_png"/>
	<e:Image id="thumb" height="74%" width="97%" source="bg_progress_bar2_png" y="4" x="3"/>
	<e:Label id="labelDisplay" textAlign="center" verticalAlign="middle"
			 size="15" fontFamily="Tahoma" textColor="0x707070"
			 horizontalCenter="0" verticalCenter="0" visible="false" locked="true"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="UnderWorldLayerSkin" width="750" height="526" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing" >
	<w:Config id="15bad65f2f3" ></w:Config>
	<e:Group id="WorldGroup" width="750" height="526" horizontalCenter="0" anchorOffsetX="0" touchChildren="false" touchEnabled="false" touchThrough="false" y="0">
		<e:Group id="DateBgGroup" width="750" height="526" y="-131.67" x="0">
			<e:Image id="SunLightImg" source="sun_png" x="159.5" y="131.67"/>
			<e:Image id="NightBgImg" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" source="bg_night_png"/>
			<e:Image id="NightStarImg" source="bg_night_star_png" height="106" y="271.35" left="1" right="-1"/>
			<e:Image id="NightMoonImg" source="night_moon_png" x="479.5" y="236.67"/>
			<e:Image source="bg_ocean_png" x="0" y="315"/>
		</e:Group>
		<e:Group id="WorldBgGroup" height="526" anchorOffsetX="0" anchorOffsetY="0" x="0" y="0" scaleX="1" scaleY="1"/>
		<e:Group id="GroupLayer1" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0">
		</e:Group>
		<e:Group id="GroupLayer2" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0"/>
		<e:Group id="GroupLayer3" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0">
		</e:Group>
		<e:Group x="80.02" y="109.85">
			<e:ProgressBar id="UnderHappinessBar" width="200" height="30" x="0" y="0" skinName="skins.UnderProgressBarSkin"/>
			<e:ProgressBar id="HappinessBar" width="200" height="30" x="0" y="0" skinName="skins.ProgressBarSkin"/>
			<e:Image width="50" height="50" x="-38" y="-8.5" source="smile_png" scaleX="1" scaleY="1"/>
		</e:Group>
		<e:Label id="CultureLabel" text="Label" x="621.34" y="445.67"/>
		<e:Label id="GameDayLabel" text="Label" x="621.34" y="475.67" textAlign="right" verticalAlign="middle"/>
	</e:Group>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="skins.VScrollBarSkin" minWidth="8" minHeight="20" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui">
    <e:Image id="thumb" scale9Grid="3,3,2,2" height="30" width="8" horizontalCenter="0" source="bg_bar_page_png"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="skins.VSliderSkin" minWidth="25" minHeight="30" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui">
    <e:Image id="track" source="track_png" scale9Grid="1,1,4,4" width="7" height="100%" horizontalCenter="0"/>
    <e:Image id="thumb" source="thumb_png" horizontalCenter="0" />
</e:Skin>
